debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ∀ ⦃i : Set ↑(spectrum ℂ a)⦄,
    ¬MeasurableSet i → continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)) = 0

      simp [toBoundedBilin]
      exact MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integral_indicator_of_not_measurable _ hi _
    rw [this]
    simp
